message:
fix(core): clippy -D warnings sweep + WebSocket masking rules

WebSocket
- Enforce RFC6455 masking directionality on decode (server rejects unmasked client frames; client rejects masked server frames)
- Tighten close-handshake state defaults and remove redundant clones
- Simplify recv loops (client/server/split) and remove redundant control-flow
- Improve URL parsing and Display formatting ergonomics

Runtime/FS/HTTP/Observability
- Address clippy -D warnings across core modules (map_or/method pointers, let-else, inline format args)
- Use io::Error::other for shared-handle errors
- Derive Default where possible; replace manual assert/panic patterns
- Fix HPACK test variable naming and HTTP/2 constant assertions for clippy pedantic

Quality gates
- cargo fmt --check
- cargo check --all-targets
- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
